evals.prompt: Write my standup for today. Yesterday I spent most of the day fixing a bug in the payment webhook handler that was causing double charges in staging. I also reviewed two PRs from Sarah. Today I'm starting on the new CSV export feature. No blockers.
evals.expected_output: A concise standup update in the Yesterday/Today/Blockers format. Yesterday should mention the payment webhook double-charge bug fix and two PR reviews. Today should mention starting the CSV export feature. Blockers: None. Total length should be under 120 words.

evals.prompt:
Here are my recent commits. Can you write my async Slack standup?

git log:
abc123 Fix null pointer in user profile endpoint
def456 Add index to users.email for faster lookup
ghi789 Write unit tests for profile endpoint
jkl012 Update API docs for profile route

Today: starting on team invitation feature. Blocked: waiting for design mockups from design team.
evals.expected_output: A Slack-formatted async standup using emoji markers. Yesterday should consolidate the commits into 2-3 lines: fixed null pointer in user profile endpoint, added DB index for faster email lookups, added tests and updated API docs for profile route. Today: starting team invitation feature. Blocker: waiting on design mockups from design team (with @design-team mention or note to tag them).

evals.prompt: Write a formal standup update for a client-facing team. I worked on: reviewed the quarterly analytics report and flagged three anomalies, had a 1:1 with the client about the roadmap, and updated the project timeline in Notion. Today I'm preparing the monthly summary deck. Blockers: need client approval on scope change before proceeding with phase 2.
evals.expected_output: A formal, full-sentence standup update (not bullet shorthand). Yesterday: reviewed quarterly analytics report and identified three anomalies, conducted roadmap discussion with client, updated project timeline documentation. Today: preparing monthly summary presentation. Blockers: phase 2 is on hold pending client approval of scope change request.
